name: Vistry Group PLC
description: Vistry Group PLC is a leading UK homebuilder distinguished by its unique Partnerships model, which focuses on delivering high-quality, mixed-tenure housing solutions. By collaborating with a diverse range of partners, including local authorities and housing associations, the company creates sustainable communities and thriving neighborhoods across the country. Vistry operates through its retail brands—Bovis, Linden, and Countryside Homes—and leverages modern methods of construction to build homes efficiently. The group is committed to social value and environmental responsibility, aiming to leave a lasting legacy of places where people love to live.
